description: Document the proper motion of Barnard's Star between 1950 and 2050 for an astrometry demonstration. From Palomar Observatory (33.35° N, 116.86° W), capture screenshots of the star centered against an equatorial coordinate grid with atmosphere and landscape disabled. Screenshots must be taken for January 1, 1950 (00:00 UTC) and January 1, 2050 (00:00 UTC) and saved to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Write an educational summary to /home/ga/Desktop/proper_motion_notes.txt that includes the star's name ('Barnard'), the observation years ('1950' and '2050'), and the phenomenon ('proper motion').
